---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 🚀 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 💡 Use Case
Describe the problem or opportunity this feature would address.

## 🎯 Proposed Solution
A detailed description of your proposed solution.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📊 Impact Assessment
**Who would benefit from this feature?**
- [ ] Security Researchers
- [ ] Smart Contract Developers
- [ ] Project Maintainers
- [ ] End Users
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**How would this improve the project?**

## 🛠️ Implementation Details
**Components that need changes:**
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Core Scanner
- [ ] Smart Contracts
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Estimated complexity:**
- [ ] Simple (1-2 days)
- [ ] Medium (1-2 weeks)
- [ ] Complex (2-4 weeks)
- [ ] Major (1+ months)

## 📋 Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.

## 🖼️ Mockups or Examples
If applicable, add screenshots, mockups, or code examples to help explain your feature request.

## 🔗 Related Issues
List any related issues or discussions.

## 🤝 Willing to Contribute
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to help implement this feature
- [ ] No, I'm just suggesting the idea

**If yes, what areas would you be comfortable working on?**
- [ ] Frontend development
- [ ] Backend development
- [ ] Core scanner logic
- [ ] Smart contract development
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Testing
